commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a post-message-tool meta-ack classifier and filters final and follow-up reply payloads through it, with unit tests and barrel exports.

PR surface: Source +109, Tests +95. Total +204 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main applies message-tool duplicate filtering in the final and follow-up delivery seams, and the helper ignores duplicate candidates shorter than 10 characters. No live channel transcript is attached, so this is not a high-confidence end-to-end reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed because the PR has concrete code defects and lacks required real channel proof; automation should not substitute for the contributor's after-fix setup evidence.

target.title: fix(reply): suppress post-tool-send meta commentary as duplicate reply
target.body:
## Problem

After an agent calls the `message` tool to deliver its main reply in a turn, models sometimes append a trailing acknowledgement ("已发 #22141", "Sent above", "核心回答如下", "OK", "Roger", "Got it"). These acks carry no information beyond the message-tool send itself but reach the channel as a second visible message — a well-known duplicate-reply pattern.

This was reported upstream as the **F30 / F31 duplicate-reply failure mode**:

> After `message(action=send, ...)` delivers the main reply, the agent's
> final text often contains a trailing meta-comment ("主回复已发 (#xxx)",
> "已发", "已发 #22141", "已发, 不再追加总结", "核心回答如下", "OK",
> "Sent above"). This final text gets dispatched as a *second* visible
> message in the channel.

The existing `filterMessagingToolDuplicates` only catches full-content duplicates via substring match with a 10-char minimum, so short meta-acks escape it. The issue reproduces reliably across providers and channels (Telegram, Discord, etc.).

## Fix

This patch adds a complementary filter — `filterMessagingToolMetaCommentary` — that recognises post-tool-send meta commentary by pattern (Chinese + English) and suppresses it from the final reply payload. Wired into both `agent-runner-payloads.ts` and `followup-delivery.ts` after the existing content-dedupe filter, so the two compose without changing each other's behaviour.

The new filter is intentionally conservative:

- **Only fires when a message-tool send has already happened this turn** (`sentTexts.length > 0`). Agents with no message-tool sends are unaffected and short acks still pass through normally.
- **Length-capped at 200 chars** and only matches anchored ack patterns.
- **Substantial trailing content after the ack (> 20 chars) is treated as a real reply** — e.g. "已发. Now let me explain the architecture ..." is NOT suppressed.
- **Media payloads are always preserved**, even if the caption is meta-ack.

### Patterns matched

| Group | Examples |
| --- | --- |
| Chinese standalone acks | `已发`, `已发送`, `主回复已发`, `好了`, `收到`, `完毕`, `完成` |
| Chinese mid-text acks | `核心回答如下`, `总结如下`, `不再追加总结`, `答案如下` |
| English standalone acks | `OK`, `Okay`, `Sent`, `Done`, `Roger`, `Got it`, `Copy that`, `Acknowledged`, `Posted`, `Replied`, `Done.` |
| English mid-text | `Replying above`, `Answer below`, `Response above` |

Plus compound forms with a brief trailing comment (≤ 20 chars after the matched phrase), e.g. `OK, that's the fix.`, `已发, 不再追加.`, `已发 #22141.`

## Files changed

- `src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers/messaging-dedupe.ts` — new `isPostToolSendMetaCommentary(text)` function and pattern table.
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers.ts` — re-export new function.
- `src/auto-reply/reply/reply-payloads-dedupe.ts` — new `filterMessagingToolMetaCommentary({ payloads, sentTexts })`.
- `src/auto-reply/reply/reply-payloads-dedupe.runtime.ts` and `reply-payloads.ts` — barrel re-exports.
- `src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-payloads.ts` and `followup-delivery.ts` — wire the new filter after the existing content dedupe.
- `src/auto-reply/reply/reply-payloads.test.ts` — 52 unit tests covering true / false cases, compound acks, length cutoffs, and media-payload preservation.

## Test coverage

| True cases (should suppress) | False cases (must keep) |
| --- | --- |
| 已发 / 已发 #22141 / 已发送 / 主回复已发 / 主回复已发 (#22142) | Real replies starting with "已发" but continuing with substantive prose |
| 核心回答如下 / 总结如下 / 不再追加总结 | "Here is my analysis of the situation." |
| Sent / Sent above / Sent #22141 / Done. / Replied above / Posted. / Acknowledged. | "Let me check that for you — one moment." |
| OK / Okay / Roger / Got it / Copy that | "The price is \$4,235.67, up 2.3% on the day." |
| Replying above / Answer below | "OK so basically the issue is that the dedupe only fires for texts of length >= 10..." |
| Compound: OK, that's the fix. / 已发, 不再追加. / Sent above #22141. | Long acks that wrap into real content |
| Case + emoji stripping: OK 👍 / '  sent  ' | Empty / whitespace-only text |
| Media payloads with meta-ack captions | (media always preserved) |

## Behavioural guarantees

- **Zero impact on agents that don't use the message tool.** `sentTexts.length === 0` short-circuits the filter.
- **Zero impact on media payloads.** Caption text is checked but media is always preserved.
- **No regressions on real replies.** Anchored patterns + 200-char cap + 20-char trailing-content limit make false positives extremely rare; the "Real replies" column in the test matrix covers the boundary cases.

## Repro before / after

Before this patch:
- User asks question
- Agent calls `message(action=send, content="Here is the analysis...")`
- Channel shows message #1: "Here is the analysis..."
- Agent's final reply: "已发 #22141, 不再追加"
- Channel shows message #2 (duplicate): "已发 #22141, 不再追加"

After this patch:
- Same flow
- Channel shows message #1: "Here is the analysis..."
- "已发 #22141, 不再追加" is suppressed by `filterMessagingToolMetaCommentary` (matched the Chinese ack pattern + 8-char trailing comment, within 20-char limit)
- Channel only shows message #1
